description: An operator analyzes waste collection data to find smart bins that are consistently underutilized, suggesting they could be relocated.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve historical fill-level data for all smart bins over the past 6 months.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent successfully queries the waste management database.

nodes.task_description: Analyze the data to identify bins whose average fill level at time of collection is below 20%.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent generates a list of underutilized bins.

nodes.task_description: Create a report for the sanitation department recommending these bins for potential relocation to higher-traffic areas.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent provides a data-driven recommendation for asset optimization.
